fields.label: Audience
fields.description: Who the coupon targets (Plumber, Painter, ...). Label only for now — does not gate redemption yet.

fields.label: Owned By Store
fields.description: Blank = central campaign (points are general, spendable anywhere). Set = this store's campaign; points earned from its coupons LOCK to that store. Distinct from Allowed Stores (which gates the legacy card-redeem path).

fields.label: Is Active
fields.description: When unchecked, cards of this campaign cannot be scanned.

fields.label: Points
fields.description: The live point value. Change anytime — applies to every unscanned card of this campaign. Already-earned points stay locked.

fields.label: Validity (Months)
fields.description: Card shelf life: months from generation until an unscanned card expires.

fields.label: Campaign End Date
fields.description: Optional. On this date the whole campaign retires: every unused card under it becomes Expired and can no longer be scanned, regardless of the card's own date.

fields.label: Allowed Stores
fields.description: Leave empty to allow redemption at any store (default). If set, only these stores may redeem cards under this campaign — checked live at redeem time, so changes apply immediately to unredeemed cards.
